basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Field Workers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has officially released a recruitment notification for Field Workers. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 01-06-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 23-06-2026

age_limit.details: Maximum Age limit: 50 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICAR IARI Field Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for ICAR IARI Field Workers Recruitment 2026 is 23 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ICAR IARI Field Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ICAR IARI has announced 4 vacancies for the post of Field Workers.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for ICAR IARI Field Workers 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 8th Class (8th Pass) from a recognized board or institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ICAR IARI Field Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ICAR IARI Field Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. There is no application fee for applying to the ICAR IARI Field Workers posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for ICAR IARI Field Workers 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration ranging from ₹18,000 to ₹20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. When did the ICAR IARI Field Workers online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for ICAR IARI Field Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official ICAR IARI website: iari.res.in
